'''lachazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dydrogesterone|dydrogesterone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dydrogesterone|dydrogesterone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lachazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læchæzhæth|læchæzhæth]] || [[word:læchæzhæj|læchæzhæj]] || [[word:læchæzhæsh|læchæzhæsh]] || [[word:læchæzhæ|læchæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachachazhath|lachachazhath]] || [[word:lachachazhaj|lachachazhaj]] || [[word:lachachazhash|lachachazhash]] || [[word:lachachazha|lachachazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachazhath|lachazhath]] || [[word:lachazhaj|lachazhaj]] || [[word:lachazhash|lachazhash]] || [[word:lachazha|lachazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachafzhath|lachafzhath]] || [[word:lachafzhaj|lachafzhaj]] || [[word:lachafzhash|lachafzhash]] || [[word:lachafzhaf|lachafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lachazhatha|lachazhatha]] || [[word:lachazhaja|lachazhaja]] || [[word:lachazhasha|lachazhasha]] || [[word:lachazhaka|lachazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lachazhath|lachazhath]] || [[word:lachazhaj|lachazhaj]] || [[word:lachazhash|lachazhash]] || [[word:lachazha|lachazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lachazhathal|lachazhathal]] || [[word:lachazhajal|lachazhajal]] || [[word:lachazhashal|lachazhashal]] || [[word:lachazhakal|lachazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lachazhathatha|lachazhathatha]] || [[word:lachazhajaja|lachazhajaja]] || [[word:lachazhashasha|lachazhashasha]] || [[word:lachazhaka|lachazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lachazhathan|lachazhathan]] || [[word:lachazhajan|lachazhajan]] || [[word:lachazhashan|lachazhashan]] || [[word:lachazhakan|lachazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lachazhathaoro|lachazhathaoro]] || [[word:lachazhajaoro|lachazhajaoro]] || [[word:lachazhashaoro|lachazhashaoro]] || [[word:lachazhakaoro|lachazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
